content.full_text:
June 13, 2007

Dennis Wagner
Wagner & Pelayes, LLP
1325 Spruce Street, Suite 200
Riverside, CA 92507

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-07-092

Dear Mr. Wagner:

This letter confirms that per your May 17, 2007 fax to our office, you have withdrawn your request for advice.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

[Signature]
By: Heather M. Rowan
Counsel, Legal Division

HMR:jgl
